title: La mentira
writer: Caridad Bravo Adams, Juan José Ortega
actors: Marga López, Jorge Mistral, Gina Cabrera
plot: When Demetrio (Jorge Mistral) arrives at a mine to meet his brother Ricardo, he finds that his sibling has committed suicide for the love of a woman. Demetrio promises to avenge Ricardo's death, so he travels to La Habana where he...
